health: local Atlas API server starts on 127.0.0.1
degradedStates: optional GitHub token or GitHub App session is unavailable
optional Supabase hosted sync is not configured
browser-harness migration has no source profile to import

records: desktop SQLite atlas.sqlite in the app userData folder
browser harness localStorage for development and CI
versioned JSON backup and restore packets
secrets: Electron safeStorage encrypted GitHub auth state
server-side environment variables for optional providers
logs: Electron and local API process output
Playwright and verification artifacts when tests run

inbound: GitHub read-only API data through the local API boundary

security.networkPolicy: desktop local API binds to 127.0.0.1 and renderer navigation is restricted to the app or API origin
sensitiveActions: deployment records require explicit human confirmation
tokens stay behind the local API or safeStorage boundary
